command: Write-Host '=== Chrome Status ==='; Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 Id, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host '=== pyautogui check ==='; python -c "import pyautogui; print('pyautogui OK: ' + pyautogui.__version__)" 2>&1; Write-Host '=== pip list relevant ==='; pip list 2>$null | Select-String 'pyautogui|pyperclip|selenium|playwright'
